creator: hodson@aciri.org
text:
In message <200105100745.f4A7jA440648@bovine.info.nara-k.ac.jp>,Takeshi MUTOH w
rites:
> I prepare mbone/relate. 
> It requires rat30.
> 
> So I update ports/26401

ports/26401 relates to rat-4.x.  It is completely independent from rat-3.x.  I 
am still waiting for someone in ports to say the the ports/26401 submission is 
okay before I can commit (I haven't chased this as I've just moved and need a 
new machine/disk for freebsd activities)...

I guess the implication here that you want the rat-3.x port updated at the 
same time as the rat-4.x port.  From an initial perusal I have no problem with 
this, though it may have been better to make a separate submission.

Thanks for the contribution - I will commit when I am setup again if someone 
else does not take this in the mean time.

Cheers
- Orion
